title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
snippet: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
snippet: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died from her injuries after the Israeli strike.

title: Meloni tells Trump to 'focus on your own popularity' as row escalates
snippet: The US president earlier questioned Meloni's popularity after suggesting she "begged" for a photo at G7 summit

title: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
snippet: The Israeli military accused Ahmed Wishah of being a "Hamas sniper operative", without providing evidence.

title: Bolivian president declares state of emergency
snippet: The move comes after weeks of anti-government protests that have caused a shortage of basic goods in Bolivia.

title: Zelensky returns highest Polish honour after award stripped
snippet: Ukraine's president said his country was open to "engagement" about "difficult and painful chapters of our shared past".

title: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
snippet: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.

title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
snippet: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

title: Australia confirms first case of H5N1 bird flu as virus reaches every continent
snippet: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.

title: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
snippet: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.

title: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
snippet: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.

title: Why the social media ban is about so much more than social media
snippet: If we are witnessing a profound shift in the online space, how will it reshape our relationship with it? Technology and AI editor Zoe Kleinman writes.

title: New video game console aims to get kids moving
snippet: The Nex Playground will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.

title: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
snippet: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.

title: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
snippet: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
